steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The task asks to emphasize a difference between the novels. The notes reveal the contrast: Julie consists primarily of letters, while Absolutely Normal Chaos consists primarily of journal entries.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: B explicitly contrasts the novels: “the former is composed primarily of letters and the latter of journal entries.” The other choices don't clearly name or distinguish the specific forms of each novel. That matches choice B — B is correct.
